What I Do

Skills

🎬
Video Editor
Cinematic edits with precise cuts, smooth transitions, and storytelling flow that keeps viewers locked in from first frame to last.
✨
Thumbnail Maker
Scroll-stopping thumbnails designed to maximize clicks. Bold visuals, sharp contrast, and compositions that demand attention.
✍️
Script Writer
Punchy, engaging scripts with strong hooks and clear narrative flow. Every word is written to hold the viewer's attention.
🔧
Plugin Maker
Custom plugins built to your exact spec. Clean, efficient code that adds real functionality and brings creative ideas to life.
